content.text:
Objectifs de l’enseignement
Acquiring the skills resulting from the methods of analysis and improvement of the security of
operating systems. Understanding the objectives, requirements and constraints specific to the application of best practices in computer security
Contenu de la matière
I. General information on Protection
- Security and System
- General information on protection
II. Concepts of Logical Security
III.
Security and protection mechanisms
- UNIX Trusted Base
- UNIX Generalities
- Windows and its security subsystem
- Memory protection
- Authentication and Identification
- Discretionary Access Control to objects - Permission System
- Security Audit
IV .
V. Securing Windows
VI. Main security tools
- Permission control
- Encryption and data encryption - Antivirus
- Security Assessment Tools
Mode d’évaluation : Contrôle continu, examen Références
Cory Altheide, Harlan Carvey, Digital Forensics with Open Source Tools, Syngress imprint of Elsevier.
Angus M.Marshall, “Digital forensics: Digital evidence in criminal investigation”, John Wiley and Sons,
